description: Perform a mobile visual audit of the Books to Scrape website using Screaming Frog SEO Spider. The audit requires JavaScript rendering with a mobile viewport of 375x812 pixels and the capture of page screenshots. Process the following URLs: https://books.toscrape.com/, https://books.toscrape.com/catalogue/category/books/travel_2/index.html, https://books.toscrape.com/catalogue/category/books/mystery_3/index.html, https://books.toscrape.com/catalogue/category/books/historical-fiction_4/index.html, and https://books.toscrape.com/catalogue/category/books/science_22/index.html. Bulk export the screenshots to ~/Documents/SEO/exports/mobile_screenshots/.
